description_long: This is a traditional barrel-shaped drum with a vibrant red wooden body and a taut, light-colored drumhead secured by a ring of gold studs. Two wooden drumsticks rest on top of the drumhead, suggesting it is ready for use. The drum features prominent gold metal ring handles on its sides, which are both decorative and functional for carrying. The drumhead appears to be made of animal hide or synthetic material, tightly stretched to produce resonant sounds. The gold studs and hardware add a decorative and robust touch, enhancing its visual appeal. The overall craftsmanship and finish suggest it is well-maintained and suitable for public performances or ceremonial use.
description: A red barrel-shaped drum with a light drumhead, gold studs, and side ring handles, topped with two wooden drumsticks. The drum is visually striking and appears well-crafted for musical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red drum body, gold ring handle, and two drumsticks resting parallel on the drumhead.
description_view_1: Side view with the gold ring handle visible and drumsticks positioned at an angle, highlighting the drum's curvature.
description_view_2: Rear view with the gold ring handle centered and drumsticks placed closer together, emphasizing the symmetry of the drum.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the gold ring handle and drumsticks at a different angle, showing the drum's rounded profile.
